THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESANGLES, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 295 MONTEREY #3, STAYED UNTIL JAN-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. AGREES TO PAY PLTF. $1475.00 BY 5PM ON 12/5/94. DEFT. SHALL VACATE PREMISES BEFORE 1/1/95, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 1/1/95, 5PM; PLTF. WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IF DEFT. PAY PLTF. THE MONEY & VACATES PREMISES; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
